title: BEM-860 real scheduler blocker
objective:
Create file governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM860_REAL_SCHEDULER_BLOCKER.md with content # BEM-860 REAL SCHEDULER BLOCKER
Status: BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
Date: 2026-05-25

Operator requires mailbox polling every 60 seconds until Claude protocol audit response appears.

Correct route:
GPT -> Curator -> Claude internal audit -> mailbox -> GPT reads mailbox.

Mailbox path:
governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md

Blocker:
External GPT chat cannot self-wake or run background timers. Previous config files describe polling but do not execute it. Real implementation must be Deno/Curator-side or another allowed always-on runtime. GitHub schedule triggers are forbidden except curator-hourly-report.yml, so do not add a new GitHub schedule trigger.

Required implementation:
Add Deno/Curator runtime job that checks the mailbox every 60 seconds, detects final statuses APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON, writes governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESULT.md, and updates governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md.

No manual operator confirmation.
No issue #31.

Also update governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md status to blocked_real_scheduler_missing and append short BEM-860 blocker note to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md. No issue comments.
